package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "errors"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for response_dto_uses_omitempty_on_required_contract_fields: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Response shapes that silently drop fields that should be stable parts of the API contract.
type CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsModel
}

type CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsService struct {
    repo *CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFields(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsDTO) error {

    var model CaseResponseDtoUsesOmitemptyOnRequiredContractFieldsModel
    if err := db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil {
        return err
    }
    return nil
}
